user.title: Polyglot Assist
user.description:
Multi-language Tier-1 conversation agent.

Pick an LLM agent to receive unmatched utterances. The intents file is read from `/config/{intents_default}` and reloadable via the `polyglot_assist.reload` service.

error.intents_not_found: Intents file not found at the given path.
error.intents_invalid: Intents file failed validation. Check the log for details.

reload.name: Reload intents
reload.description: Rebuild the multi-language Hassil matcher from the configured intents file.

test_match.name: Test match
test_match.description: Run a string through the matcher without dispatching.
